info.enigmatica.antikythera_mechanism.original: Right-Click an Illager Trophy to bring it to life!

info.enigmatica.aura_bottle.original: Use a Bottle and Cork in an area of high Aura in the Overworld.

info.enigmatica.beheading_tools.original: Easily cleaves the heads from your foes!

info.enigmatica.biome_essentia.original: Use on a Block of the Skies to convert the biome in a large area.

info.enigmatica.birth_spirit.original: Obtained by manually breeding animals in high Aura areas.

info.enigmatica.bleachdew.original: Use Bone Meal on a Lotus Flower to obtain Bleachdew.

info.enigmatica.borrowed_flame.create_ga.original: Create a Catching Fire Gate Pearl in the Particle Accelerator to summon a Gateway.

info.enigmatica.borrowed_flame.defeat_ga.original: Defeat the Gateway to obtain "Borrowed" Flame.

info.enigmatica.break_prevention.original: When applied to a tool in an anvil, the tool will stop working when durability runs out instead of being destroyed.

info.enigmatica.coral.original: May be obtained by using Bone Meal on Gravel or Sand under water in an Ocean Biome.

info.enigmatica.coral.cascading_islands.original: The Cascading Islands count as an Ocean Biome.

info.enigmatica.ether_gas.auto_harvestin.original: Enables auto-harvesting in the Hydroponic Bed.

info.enigmatica.ether_gas.gentle_harvest.original: Enables gentle-harvesting in the Plant Gatherer.

info.enigmatica.ether_gas.ore_multiplier.original: Enables 5x Ore Multiplier in the Fermentation Station.

info.enigmatica.evoker_trophy.original: Right-Click an Evoker Trophy with an Antikythera Mechanism to bring it to life!

info.enigmatica.golden_leaves.original: Obtained by using Brilliant Fiber on leaves. Allow to spread for best effect.

info.enigmatica.illager_trophy.original: Right-Click with an Antikythera Mechanism to bring it to life!

info.enigmatica.industrial_insulation_bl.original: Absorbs and voids any fluids placed nearby.

info.enigmatica.justdirethings_clicker.original: Can be automated using a JustDireThings Clicker.

info.enigmatica.lotus_pistils.original: Lotus Pistils may be planted on Lily Pads to convert them into a Lotus Flower.

info.enigmatica.mob_heads.original: Heads may be obtained from mobs by killing them with particularly powerful axes and paxels.

info.enigmatica.mob_heads.search.original: Search for §5#beheading§r in EMI for a list!

info.enigmatica.pillager_trophy.original: Right-Click a Pillager Trophy with an Antikythera Mechanism to bring it to life!

info.enigmatica.processors.blueprint.original: Purchase a Blueprint from a Fluix Researcher.

info.enigmatica.projectile_generator.aut.original: May be automated with a Supplementaries Cannon.

info.enigmatica.sky_dust.original: Sky Dust can be generated by pointing an Annihilation Plane at the sky at build limit (§2Y=319§r).

info.enigmatica.sludge.original: May be produced in a Sludge Refiner. Sludge is a by-product of the Plant Gatherer.

info.enigmatica.soul_shattering_mobs.original: Obtained with a Soul Shattering weapon from the following mobs:

info.enigmatica.strange_materials.original: May appear when using Bone Meal on Blighted land.

info.enigmatica.time_changer.rotation.original: The rotation of the Hand of Time denotes the time it will change to, with up being midnight and down being noon.

info.enigmatica.time_changer.setup.original: To set it up, place an Item Frame on the device and insert a Hand of Time.

info.enigmatica.time_changer.trigger.original: Drop a Clock nearby to trigger the effect.

info.enigmatica.time_changer.use.original: May be used to change to a specific time of day at the expense of Aura.

info.enigmatica.vacuum_bottle.original: Use a Bottle and Cork in an area devoid of Aura.

info.enigmatica.vindicator_trophy.original: Right-Click a Vindicator Trophy with an Antikythera Mechanism to bring it to life!

info.enigmatica.weather_changer.trigger.original: Drop one of the following items nearby to trigger the effect:

info.enigmatica.weather_changer.use.original: May be used to change the weather at the expense of Aura.

info.enigmatica.wireless_charger_antenna.original: Place on top of an Enderio Wireless Charger to increase its range.

info.enigmatica.witch_trophy.original: Right-Click a Witch Trophy with an Antikythera Mechanism to bring it to life!

tooltip.enigmatica.animal_fodder.original: Feeds animals and induces them to breed

tooltip.enigmatica.arcane_blocked_attack.original: Arcane Instrument: Blocked Attacks Boost Spell Damage and Mana Regen

tooltip.enigmatica.arcane_hover.original: Arcane Instrument: Allows the Wearer to Hover

tooltip.enigmatica.arcane_item_to_source.original: Arcane Instrument: Converts Items to Source

tooltip.enigmatica.arcane_lingering_poti.original: Arcane Instrument: Converts Potions to Lingering Potions

tooltip.enigmatica.arcane_mana_pool.original: Arcane Instrument: Increases Personal Mana Pool

tooltip.enigmatica.arcane_mana_regen.original: Arcane Instrument: Increases Personal Mana Regen Rate

tooltip.enigmatica.arcane_random_effects.original: Arcane Instrument: Grants Random Potion Effects

tooltip.enigmatica.arcane_splash_potions.original: Arcane Instrument: Converts Potions to Splash Potions

tooltip.enigmatica.armor_insulation.original: May be used to insulate armor

tooltip.enigmatica.aura_animal_breeding.original: Induces animals to breed in areas with high Aura

tooltip.enigmatica.aura_ore_conversion.original: Converts stone to random ores with Aura

tooltip.enigmatica.awaken_trophy.original: Right-Click the Trophy with an Antikythera Mechanism to awaken it.

tooltip.enigmatica.break_prevention.original: Prevents using a tool if it would break on the next use

tooltip.enigmatica.inhibits_aura_cache_r.original: Inhibits Aura from charging a worn Aura Cache or Aura Trove

tooltip.enigmatica.inhibits_aura_nether_.original: Inhibits Aura induced grass growth in the Nether

tooltip.enigmatica.inhibits_boosted_plan.original: Inhibits boosted plant growth from Aura

tooltip.enigmatica.universal_chalk.original: May replace any Chalk in any pentacle

tooltip.enigmatica.visualizes_apparatus_.original: Arcane Instrument: Visualizes Apparatus Effect Area

tooltip.enigmatica.weeping_well_location.original: The Weeping Well is located on the Vexing Island

tooltip.enigmatica.wixie_conversion.original: Sneak Right-Click on the block to convert.
